summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED - Fixed 'Error al guardar visita' by adding missing GESTOR_AUXILIAR role to UserRole class. The endpoint POST /api/actualizacion/proyectos/{proyecto_id}/predios/{codigo_predial}/visita was failing with AttributeError because it referenced a role that didn't exist.

bugs_fixed_during_test.issue: AttributeError: type object 'UserRole' has no attribute 'GESTOR_AUXILIAR' - The guardar_visita_predio endpoint at line 17471 referenced a role that wasn't defined in the UserRole class
bugs_fixed_during_test.fix: Added GESTOR_AUXILIAR = 'gestor_auxiliar' to the UserRole class definition

critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE: The guardar_visita_predio endpoint at line 17471 checked for UserRole.GESTOR_AUXILIAR in the role validation, but this role was never defined in the UserRole class
FIX APPLIED: Added GESTOR_AUXILIAR = 'gestor_auxiliar' to UserRole class at line 203
VERIFIED: Endpoint now returns 200 OK with message 'Visita guardada correctamente'
TEST COVERAGE: 6 tests created and all passing - login, predios list, minimal visita, complete visita, error handling, persistence verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: The visita endpoint is now working. The fix was adding GESTOR_AUXILIAR role to UserRole class. Test predio 547200101000000010001000000000 in project 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423 can be used for testing.

rca_of_the_issue.error_message: AttributeError: type object 'UserRole' has no attribute 'GESTOR_AUXILIAR'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The backend endpoint guardar_visita_predio at line 17471 referenced UserRole.GESTOR_AUXILIAR in the role validation check, but this role constant was never defined in the UserRole class definition at lines 199-207.
reproduction_steps: 2. Navigate to Visor Actualización for project Proyecto_prueba_ZU_Sardinata
3. Select a predio and open the Visita form
4. Fill in the form and click Save
5. Error 'Error al guardar visita' appears because backend returns 500
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added line 'GESTOR_AUXILIAR = "gestor_auxiliar"  # Gestor auxiliar - apoyo en trabajo de campo' to the UserRole class
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested with curl and pytest - all 6 tests passing, endpoint returns 200 OK
